programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.desc: At Indiana State Prison, visitation is a valued privilege for inmates, but it can also be abused; it's the most common route for contraband to enter the prison; an anonymous tip has put Internal Affairs on high alert.

programme.title: Lockup: Indiana: Extended Stay
programme.desc: From the most trusted inmates, working at the prison barbershop, to inmate assaults on prison staff, or inmates who turn violence against themselves, at Indiana State Prison, "cutting" has many meanings.

programme.title: Lockup: Indiana: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Alcohol is not allowed inside Indiana State Prison; that doesn't stop the inmates from making it, or correctional officers from confiscating it; in past years, the most common forms of contraband were drugs or tobacco; today it's cell phones.

programme.title: Lockup: Indiana: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Using a form of integration at Indiana State that goes beyond race, the Residential Treatment Unit selects inmates with a history of good behavior to live with and serve as mentors to inmates with mental health issues.

programme.title: Lockup: Indiana: Extended Stay
programme.desc: In a world dictated by fear, some resort to violence, and others become victims, while those on death row at Indiana State Prison can only wait for the inevitable.

programme.title: Lockup: Raw
programme.desc: Using inmates to turn troubled teens away from a life of crime; inmates express their regrets.

programme.title: Lockup: Raw
programme.desc: In prison, as on the outside, a single decision can change a person's life forever; inmates make all kinds of fateful choices, but behind bars, there is no escaping the consequences of one's actions.

programme.title: Lockup: Raw
programme.desc: In prison WTF stands for workouts, tattoos and food.

programme.title: Lockup: Indiana: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A brutal stabbing puts Indiana State Prison on edge; a brash new inmate gets taken down a notch; two buddies do their time together; cameras are put into the hands of inmates who share intimate thoughts about life behind bars.

programme.title: Lockup: Indiana: Extended Stay
programme.desc: At Indiana State Prison, visitation is a valued privilege for inmates, but it can also be abused; it's the most common route for contraband to enter the prison; an anonymous tip has put Internal Affairs on high alert.

programme.title: Lockup: Charleston: Extended Stay
programme.desc: An inmate finds himself at the center of more than one battle, and he traces his problems back to the real-life nightmare that haunts his family; a young new arrival faces a charge of reckless homicide.

programme.title: Lockup: Charleston: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A young woman finds love in the jail's one co-ed housing unit; another inmate, charged with a spree of armed robberies, now comes under investigation inside the jail; a father speaks for his son, who if found guilty, could face the death penalty.

programme.title: Lockup: Charleston: Extended Stay
programme.desc: The survivor of a vicious attack shares his story in the hopes that other inmates will never commit such violence; for another inmate, it's too late to turn back the clock and now the pain of incarceration has begun to take a toll.

programme.title: Lockup: Charleston: Extended Stay
programme.desc: An agitated inmate takes severe measures to get staff's attention; a young first-timer is found unconscious in his cell; another inmate garners "enemy status" within the jail.

programme.title: Lockup: Charleston: Extended Stay
programme.desc: The jail's Special Operations Group is called in to deal with a difficult inmate; a well-known inmate returns to jail, but this time, he's in with his girlfriend, who might be harboring a secret that could dramatically affect both their lives.

programme.title: Lockup: Charleston: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A fight breaks out over snacks but officers want to know if there was something else behind it; an open transgender inmate, who "escorts" on the street, chooses general population over protective custody; an inmate is found dead in his bunk.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Izzie Balmer and Charlie Ross sail to the Isle of Wight for their final leg. Our experts go into auction battle one last time, when Izzie's silver brooch goes against Charlie's silver pen.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Angus Ashworth and Steven Moore travel from the Borders to the Lake District. They encounter the story of the country's greatest archers and visit a part of Scotland that's slowly revealing its secrets to archaeologists.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Steven Moore and Angus Ashworth are shopping their way along the byways of Scotland. Angus bags something aromatic and coffee related, while Steven springs for a little treasure from his fellow expert's back yard in Yorkshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: While Angus Ashworth strips off for an unlikely history lesson, Steven Moore tucks into a local delicacy. Will a rough ferry crossing leave them feeling sick at the Clitheroe auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Steven Moore and Angus Ashworth hit the byways of Derbyshire and Yorkshire. They visit a couple of survivors from the Industrial Revolution and enjoy some regional pastries before heading off to an auction in the town of Bedale.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Steven Moore and Angus Ashworth browse the emporiums of northeast England, parting with their big budget. But who will be victorious at the deciding auction in Dundee?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Louise Gostelow and David Harper sightsee around Northern Ireland in an old VW Beetle, on the lookout for an antique bargain. David visits the oldest distillery in the world, and Louise heads to the coast to sample some seaweed.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Louise Gostelow and David Harper continue their adventures in Northern Ireland. David gets a shock when he gets his hands on a Victorian cure-all, while Louise finds an ally while shopping.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Louise Gostelow and David Harper hit the shops in the northwest of England in their classic VW Beetle, keeping an eye out for items of interest, including some KGB spy equipment.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Louise Gostelow and David Harper are in Wales, where Louise hopes to be sitting pretty with her collection of chairs, and David tries to step out of his comfort zone.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Louise Gostelow and David Harper begin their last day on the moors of West Yorkshire. Louise gets her hands on a very early labor-saving device, and David takes a shine to some theatre seats, but how many he can afford?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp splurges on an expensive French sunburst clock, and a Victorian scent bottle has her swooning. But former soldier Raj Bisram finds ammunition boxes and a steel helmet a lot more attractive.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Raj Bisram continue their rally through East Anglia in the 1960s Sunbeam Rapier. Raj does a spot of 'step dancing' in a local pub, while Natasha buys a jukebox from the 1800s.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In Kent, Raj Bisram nabs a post-Napoleonic French eagle, but cherubs and art deco costume jewelry are more Natasha Raskin Sharp's style. Which of them will clean up at the Colchester sale?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the team head for Hampton Court Palace to assess a bronze figure by Auguste Rodin and an early longcase clock, but the day's absolute find is an early sketch by the abstract artist Piet Mondrian valued at between £50-70,000.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A return visit to Hampton Court reveals a coral bracelet valued at £30,000, a rare black wax doll, a dress designed by Vivienne Westwood, and a small silver pig carried by Howard Somerville on his expedition to the summit of Mount Everest.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team head to Hornsea on the Yorkshire coast; they find a chastity belt dug up on a farm, an 1875 sewing machine, and a haul of Beatles memorabilia. Michael meets a man who lovingly preserves over 40 models of Humber cars.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team returns to Dyrham Park in Gloucestershire. They find an 18th Century court dress worth £10,000, a diamond, pearl, and ruby brooch, a gift given from the Queen Mother to her Head Chef in 1937, and a tin cup turns out to be a rare piece of silver.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael hosts a long-overdue visit to the Scottish capital of Edinburgh, where the team finds an ornate Russian cigarette case, a bizarre tourist's trinket depicting a dozen types of torture, and a lock of Beethoven's hair.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team visits Wilton House near Salisbury. They find 200 typewriters, a suffragette doll dressed in clothes cut from women protestors prison uniforms, a ring worn by the daughter of Charles I in 1635, and an ornate table valued at £20 to £30,000.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the team head for Cardiff. Amongst the treasures, they discover a boot sale for 10 pence and now valued at £700 to £1,000, a rare Prince of Wales tea caddy, and a dusty clock valued at up to £35,000.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael introduces a special edition from the lavishly decorated interior of Cardiff Castle. Featured items are an African witch doctor's ceremonial stick, a schoolboy's exercise book from 1745, and a Scandinavian drinking tankard valued at £12,000.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the team visit King's College, Cambridge. The intriguing finds are a letter from Florence Nightingale, the racing silk of a famous jockey, a collection of old wedding photographs, and an Art Deco diamond brooch found in wartime London.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A return visit to Kings College, Cambridge is where the team finds a machine gun from World War One, a papal portrait rescued from the bottom of a river, and a set of rare maps recording America's early settlement valued at £10,000.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Roadshow team set up camp at Tyntesfield House near Bristol. Amongst the treasures brought for valuation are an elegant grape holder made from silver, a cabinet of rare microscope slides, and a ruby and diamond brooch valued at £30,000.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Roadshow visits the Outer Hebrides as Michael and the team head for Stornoway on the island of Lewis. They assess some gruesome medical instruments, a table made from shipwreck salvage, and a painting bought for a song is valued at £20,000.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the team visit the winner of the first BBC series of Restoration, the Victoria Baths in Manchester. They are presented with an Art Deco cigarette case, a 'shock therapy machine,' and an ornate pedestal that had been abandoned in a garage.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The special Michael marks the 200th anniversary of the Battle of Trafalgar. Assessed items are ornately decorated ostrich eggs carved by a member of the ship's crew and a box made out of debris taken from the vessel in the battle's aftermath.

programme.desc: Extraordinary photography reveals the hidden senses and secret communication skills of animals.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Cats
programme.desc: The Secret Life of Cats reveals cats as you've never seen them before.

programme.title: Cats Uncovered
programme.desc: Liz Bonnin joins forces with some of the world's top cat experts to conduct a groundbreaking study.

programme.title: Cats Uncovered
programme.desc: Liz Bonnin and some of the world's leading cat experts reveal the wild sides of domestic cats; with GPS trackers and cameras, they discover how a cat can transform from pampered pet to purring predator.

programme.title: Cats Uncovered
programme.desc: Liz Bonnin and a team of scientists reveal the secret language of domestic cats, the surprising conversations they have when their owners are asleep, and why they meow at humans but not each other.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Dogs
programme.desc: Martin Clunes delves into the world of man's best friend, the dog.

programme.title: Pets: Wild at Heart

programme.title: Pets: Wild at Heart

programme.title: Frozen Planet

programme.title: Gorilla Family and Me
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan realises a lifelong dream by gaining the trust of a family of rare Grauer's Gorillas, the largest primates on Earth.

programme.title: Gorilla Family and Me
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan returns to the Democratic Republic of Congo to discover the fate of his gorilla family.

programme.title: Homegrown Tastes South Africa
programme.desc: Lorna meets her good friend, model Blue Mbombo, in her home province of the Free State.

programme.title: Homegrown Tastes South Africa
programme.desc: Lorna meets petrol-head and comedian Mpho Popps in Soweto.

programme.title: Homegrown Tastes South Africa
programme.desc: Lorna Maseko meets a feast of local foodies, from celebrities to incredible chefs.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The series starts in autumnal Bordeaux. Rick arrives just in time to judge a local wine contest, and hires a 2CV for an excursion to the coast - abundant with mussels and oysters.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein enjoys a winter break in Reykjavik in search of the perfect cod and sampling succulent fjord-reared roast lamb.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick enjoys a weekend in Berlin, where history and the avant garde dwell enticingly side by side. A city that once made history with its divisive wall teems today with an overwhelming array of innovative chefs offering delicious seasonal creations.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein visits Vienna, the city that once ran the Austro-Hungarian Empire. It is home to comfort dishes like tafelspitz and goulash, and it also gave its name to one of Europe's most popular dishes, the wiener schnitzel.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits Bologna in northern Italy, a city so famous for its food that it's known as the stomach of Italy. He learns how to make the local fresh egg pasta used for tortellini, tagliatelle, ravioli and lasagne.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein visits Lisbon on the banks of the River Tagus, a city in love with its seafood and possibly the best custard tarts in the world. The culinary effects of Portugal's historic explorations are still seen in its dishes.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits the home of New Nordic cuisine, Copenhagen, where ground-breaking chefs create artful dishes and religiously stick to seasonal Danish ingredients. Rick goes foraging for rosehip and learns about the art of pickling buds, bark and flowers.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein heads to southern Spain and the historic city of Cadiz, where the narrow winding streets captivate him as he walks in the footsteps of the ancient Phoenician and Arab traders whose influence on the city can still be seen today.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits the north-eastern Greek city of Thessaloniki.

programme.title: World's Most Luxurious
programme.desc: A look at top-end trains, such as South Africa's famous Blue Train, the Golden Eagle in Russia, and the Presidential Train in Portugal.

programme.title: World's Most Luxurious
programme.desc: Only the world's richest can possibly afford a super yacht, but it is not the price tag that makes these extravagant vessels exceptional, it is the luxurious details.

programme.title: World's Most Luxurious

programme.title: World's Most Luxurious

programme.title: World's Most Luxurious

programme.title: World's Most Luxurious

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un joven desaparece de su casa en St. Louis, la UAC vuelve a investigar un caso similar sin resolver en busca del sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Fin del juego
programme.desc: Con la ayuda del equipo, Vance se enfrenta a sus demonios mientras descubre una compleja relación con un asesino que pone en peligro a toda su familia.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Apagón
programme.desc: El equipo se encuentra literalmente a oscuras cuando la investigación sobre la muerte de un teniente se relaciona con un apagón en toda la ciudad.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Juego de niños
programme.desc: El trabajo diurno de un marine muerto en un laboratorio de ideas del gobierno lleva a Gibbs y al equipo a la vida de un niño prodigio de 12 años que puede ser el próximo objetivo del asesino.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Fe
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo alistado de un coronel retirado convertido en predicador aparece muerto, el equipo cree que puede ser víctima de un crimen de odio. Mientras tanto, el padre de Gibbs viene de visita por vacaciones.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que una mujer es asesinada en su apartamento, Danny y Báez recurren a su hija, Margo, para pedir ayuda, pero en cambio ella complica la investigación.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: El amigo de Frank, Lenny, le revela que un próximo artículo revelador expondrá algo de la ropa sucia del NYPD. Erin debe decidir cómo cargar a un médico cuyos tratamientos experimentales llevaron a la muerte de su hija.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de un incidente en el que los refuerzos del oficial Witten no pudieron mantenerse físicamente a la par de una persecución, Frank debe decidir si implementar una prueba de aptitud más rigurosa para el NYPD.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que alguien irrumpa en la casa de Luis Delgado y mate a su esposa, Luis y Danny se unen para atrapar al malvado asesino, quien también puede ser responsable de la muerte de Linda.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un joven desaparece de su casa en St. Louis, la UAC vuelve a investigar un caso similar sin resolver en busca del sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC es llamado a Kansas para investigar una serie de asesinatos, una reunión tensa comienza entre Blake y su padre, un capitán de policía retirado, y su hermano, un detective, y deben trabajar juntos para ayudar a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC va a San José para investigar una serie de asesinatos, García profundiza en su pasado hacker y se reencuentra con su antiguo amor para ayudar al equipo con el caso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras que el UAC busca un asesino múltiple suelto en Cleveland, Rossi se preocupa cuando un antiguo sargento de la Marina se pierde y se dirige a Los Ángeles para encontrarlo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Fe
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo alistado de un coronel retirado convertido en predicador aparece muerto, el equipo cree que puede ser víctima de un crimen de odio. Mientras tanto, el padre de Gibbs viene de visita por vacaciones.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/1/2016. Anthony Bourdain visits the iconic Old Town Ale House, eats mapo tofu in Chinatown and shares a home-cooked meal with rapper Lupe Fiasco.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/8/2016. On the island of Naxos, Anthony Bourdain dives to a sunken shipwreck, drinks raki with locals and samples cuisine fresh off a fishing boat.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 4/28/2019. Kamau visits Dallas, TX - the home of the Megachurch, to find out what is creating the new face of Christianity today, in a city where church and state are far from separate.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 5/5/2019. While in and around Seattle, Kamau takes a look at different forms of activism that white people are using to combat America’s history of white supremacy and the rise of extreme right wing groups across the country.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 5/12/2019. Kamau meets members of the Hmong community brought here after the Secret War forced their expulsion from Laos and learns the multi generational stories of loss, perseverance and hope that make up their American journey.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 5/19/2019. Kamau visits Jackson, MS to explore the divisive world of reproductive rights and reproductive justice including abortion, sex education, and women’s health.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 5/26/2019. Kamau takes a look at Washington D.C. through the eyes of the city’s residents who show him the vibrant culture of D.C. that is distinct from the Washington politics that surround it.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 4/24/2016. Anthony Bourdain explores the Philippines at Christmas and eats at beloved chicken chain Jollibee, samples sisig and indulges in the popular dessert halo-halo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/1/2016. Anthony Bourdain visits the iconic Old Town Ale House, eats mapo tofu in Chinatown and shares a home-cooked meal with rapper Lupe Fiasco.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/8/2016. On the island of Naxos, Anthony Bourdain dives to a sunken shipwreck, drinks raki with locals and samples cuisine fresh off a fishing boat.

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Aired 10/1/2017. Lisa Ling goes on a journey through the scintillating worlds of Tantra and surrogate partner therapy in search of sexual healing.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/14/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia: Myanmar, the city of Yangon and the remote Bagan temple.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A daring driver takes officers on a wild ride, a man offers a bizarre excuse for the items found in his car, and a man is arrested after threatening his neighbor with a gun.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female assailant attacks a woman after merely bumping into her. A woman is arrested for spilling beer on an unsuspecting cameraman’s expensive equipment. Two intoxicated women are placed under arrest after a physical altercation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist runs a red light then runs from police, deputies arrest an uncooperative domestic violence suspect, and a low-speed chase ends in a drug arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate a possible abduction at a trailer park. A man in a stolen truck is pulled over and Officers discover washed checks and drug paraphernalia. A suspect is arrested after abandoning a stolen vehicle behind a fast food restaurant.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Multiple units pursue a stolen vehicle on the run. A woman tells officers her intoxicated boyfriend destroyed her mailbox then fled. A loaded shotgun is found in a vehicle after a brief pursuit.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist leads officers on a high-speed chase, a dead car battery won't stop a man from eluding the police, and a wanted driver fails to avoid an arrest.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: Escuela para solteras

programme.title: Amor sin escalas
programme.desc: Ryan (ganador del Oscar, George Clooney) vuela a todos lados por trabajo, pero luego de conocer a una pasajera se da cuenta de que la vida no se trata del viaje, sino de las conexiones que se hagan en el camino.

programme.title: El embajador del miedo
programme.desc: Mientras toda la nación ve avanzar la campaña presidencial hacia las elecciones, un soldado corre contra el tiempo para descubrir una conspiración detrás de ella, una conspiración que podría destruir a la democracia misma.

programme.title: A contrarreloj
programme.desc: En este fascinante thriller, el jefe de Policía (Denzel Washington) de una pequeña ciudad, se ve inmerso en graves problemas al investigar el asesinato de una mujer con la que mantenía una relación en secreto porque todas las pruebas apuntan a él.

La mente maestra detrás del club nocturno más popular de Nueva York deja ingresar a un joven y lo contrata como asistente de barman. Con un elenco de estrellas y una banda sonora exitosa, esta será la fiesta más legendaria del planeta.

programme.title: Harlem Nights
programme.desc: Sugar Ray es el propietario de una casa de juego en Harlem. Con la ayuda de su hijo Quick, tratará de evitar que el gángster Bugsy Callhoune, que cuenta con la colaboración de un policía corrupto, se entrometa en sus negocios.

programme.title: Un perdedor sin suerte
programme.desc: Ferrell nunca ha estado mejor (Galán) como un vendedor que pierde a su esposa y su trabajo en el mismo día y, ante el colapso de su vida, empieza a vivir en su patio delantero.

programme.title: John Grisham's: el poder de la justicia
programme.desc: Matt Damon es Rudy Baylor, un abogado novato superado por un caso de alto perfil. En su contra, un ejército de tiburones de la ley. De su lado, Deck Shifflet, un batallador "para-abogado" que nunca consiguió obtener su título.

programme.title: Ni en tus sueños
programme.desc: En esta comedia, Kirk, un tipo común, no puede creer su suerte cuando la exitosa y preciosa Molly se enamora de él. Sus amigos listos, su familia loca y hasta su insoportable exnovia están tan conmocionados como él.

programme.title: Con Locura
programme.desc: Una universitaria británica se enamora de un estudiante estadounidense, del que debe separarse al ser expulsada del país por el vencimiento de su permiso.

programme.title: La terminal
programme.desc: Luego de llegar al aeropuerto JFK de Nueva York, Viktor Navorski se encuentra atrapado involuntariamente en vaivenes burocráticos que no le permiten regresar a su país ni entrar a los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Lars y una chica de verdad
programme.desc: Lars (Ryan Gosling), un chico dulce y ermitaño, se pierde en un cómico triángulo amoroso al encontrar a la chica de sus sueños en una muñeca llamada Bianca, a la vez que comienza a sentirse atraído por su compañera de trabajo, Margo.

programme.title: Inspiración
programme.desc: Gabriel conoce a Alejandra en una discoteca y no puede dejar de pensar en ella. Pero ella no siente lo mismo. Cuando no le gustas a la chica de tus sueños ¿qué estás dispuesto a hacer para enamorarla?

programme.title: Lars y una chica de verdad
programme.desc: Lars (Ryan Gosling), un chico dulce y ermitaño, se pierde en un cómico triángulo amoroso al encontrar a la chica de sus sueños en una muñeca llamada Bianca, a la vez que comienza a sentirse atraído por su compañera de trabajo, Margo.

programme.title: Las estafadoras
programme.desc: Una mujer y su hija son estafadoras profesionales que utilizan sus armas de seducción para engañar a millonarios, hasta que la joven hija se enamora poniendo en apuros el último golpe: un excéntrico magnate del tabaco.

programme.title: El sustituto (1996)
programme.desc: An ex-marine goes undercover as a substitute teacher and discovers a gang is terrorizing the high school. As lives are threatened, he sets out to clean up the crime-infested school.

programme.title: CAOS
programme.desc: Dos policías, un novato (Phillippe) y un veterano de cabellos grises (Statham), persiguen a un hábil ladrón de bancos (Snipes).

programme.title: Caza Terrorista
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage enciende un barril de pólvora de acción mientras un veterano agente de la CIA va a la caza de su némesis, un terrorista mortal.

programme.title: Perdido en la fama
programme.desc: Un rockero semi retirado y caprichoso (Antonio Banderas) debe espabilarse para rescatar a su esposa, quien ha sido secuestrada mientras se encontraba de vacaciones en Chile.

programme.title: Transpecos (LAS)
programme.desc: For three US Border Patrol agents, the contents of one car reveals a dark secret within their unit that could cost them all their lives. SXSW Grand Jury Award Winner 2016

programme.title: Highlander: El juego final
programme.desc: Dos mundos se unen cuando la estrella de cine de HIGHLANDER Christopher Lambert forma equipo con la estrella de la serie de televisión HIGHLANDER Adrian Paul para combatir a un temible villano y su despiadada banda de inmortales.

programme.title: F/X: Efectos mortales
programme.desc: Rollie Tyler, un técnico de efectos especiales, acepta 30.000 dólares del Programa de Protección de Testigos para escenificar el falso asesinato de un miembro de la mafia que está dispuesto a dar nombres.

programme.title: El Crimen del Padre Amaro LAS
programme.desc: La política y las pasiones sexuales amenazan con corromper a un joven sacerdote recién ordenado en un pequeño pueblo mexicano.

programme.title: El ardor
programme.desc: Gael García Bernal protagoniza a un misterioso héroe que emerge de la selva argentina para rescatar a una joven (Alice Braga) y al rancho de su familia, de brutales usurpadores de tierra.

programme.title: Fuera del cielo
programme.desc: El drama de 24 horas comienza a las 6 de la mañana con el joven Cucú, cuyo hermano Malboro lo recibe después de una separación de cinco años. Una vez reunidos, planean un robo que los lleva a una serie de encuentros con diferentes personas.

programme.title: Antes que cante el gallo
programme.desc: Carmín, una adolescente, sueña con mudarse a la ciudad con su madre, pero sus deseos se desvanecen cuando se muda a los Estados Unidos con su nuevo esposo en un pueblo de Puerto Rico y su abuela.

programme.title: Baracoa
programme.desc: En un tranquilo pueblo cubano, Leonel, un niño introspectivo, contempla el cambio mientras su amigo mayor, Antuán, se muda a la ciudad.

programme.title: Ilusiones S.A.
programme.desc: Para hacer feliz a su mujer, un hombre contrata a una empresa que crea fantasías para fingir que su nieto, quien los dejó hace años, es un hombre de bien. Pero el verdadero nieto, quien es en realidad un delincuente, se aparece exigiendo dinero.

programme.title: Un padre no tan padre
programme.desc: La nueva era choca con la vieja en esta hilarante y cálida comedia familiar sobre un anciano gruñón de 85 años que se muda con su hijo y sus excéntricos compañeros de casa.

programme.title: La maldición
programme.desc: En este thriller apasionante y sobrenatural con las estrellas más populares de Hollywood, un temor del estudio crece hasta convertirse en una vertiginosa pesadilla para un profesor y tres sujetos atrapados en una mansión misteriosa.

programme.title: Caso 39
programme.desc: Renée Zellweger, ganadora de un Oscar, protagoniza la película de suspenso sobrenatural de una trabajadora social, que tiene asignado el raro e inquietante caso de Lillith Sullivan, una niña con un extraño y misterioso pasado.

programme.title: Las ruinas
programme.desc: "The Ruins" sigue a un grupo de amigos que se ven atrapados en una lucha brutal de supervivencia después de visitar una remota excavación arqueológica en la selva mexicana donde descubren un ser mortal entre las ruinas.

programme.title: La maldición
programme.desc: En este thriller apasionante y sobrenatural con las estrellas más populares de Hollywood, un temor del estudio crece hasta convertirse en una vertiginosa pesadilla para un profesor y tres sujetos atrapados en una mansión misteriosa.

programme.title: Caso 39
programme.desc: Renée Zellweger, ganadora de un Oscar, protagoniza la película de suspenso sobrenatural de una trabajadora social, que tiene asignado el raro e inquietante caso de Lillith Sullivan, una niña con un extraño y misterioso pasado.

programme.title: La maldición gitana
programme.desc: Un abogado obeso accidentalmente corre y mata a una anciana gitana. Después de que su viejo lo maldice, él comienza a perder peso y no puede parar. Basado en la novela de Stephen King, escrita bajo el seudónimo de Richard Bachman.

programme.title: Zack y Miri hacen una porno
programme.desc: Para resolver sus problemas económicos, Zack y Miri, una pareja de amigos de toda la vida, deciden producir una película porno.

programme.title: SUNDOWN
programme.desc: En esta comedia hilarante y llena de acción, los mejores amigos Logan y Blake viajan a la destinación exótica de Puerto Vallarta para las vacaciones de primavera. Allí van a encontrar un paraíso de tequila con grandes problemas.

programme.title: Torrente 5
programme.desc: El policía corrupto sale de la cárcel en el 2018 para encontrar una España diferente a la que conocía.

programme.title: Resaca mortal
programme.desc: Después de celebrar la próxima boda de Doug en un hotel en Laughlin, Nevada, los chicos con resaca Bradley, Ed y Zach se despiertan en una distopía futurista, al haber perdido a su amigo, Doug.

programme.title: Mi suegra y yo
programme.desc: Historia que relata las dificultades por las que pasa una pareja recién casada cuando acepta la visita temporal de la suegra, quien tiene un carácter intenso y fuera de control, lo que pondrá en riesgo la unión matrimonial.

programme.title: Los fabulosos má mejores
programme.desc: Un equipo dominicano de béisbol infantil y su loco entrenador deben encontrar la manera de usar su encanto y habilidades para recaudar los fondos necesarios para competir en el primer Torneo de Béisbol de la Liga Pequeña y ganar el campeonato.

programme.title: Me gusta la tuya
programme.desc: Ricardo, médico divorciado, se enamora de Claudia e intenta conocerla por medio de su hermano. Todos sus amigos malinterpretan la situación y comienzan a sospechar sobre sus intenciones.

programme.title: The Big Country
programme.desc: Burl Ives earned a Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his portrayal of a family patriarch involved in a bitter land feud in this explosive western drama that also features a sumptuous musical score.

programme.title: Hang 'Em High
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood stars in this brazen tale about a rampaging band of vigilantes who make two mistakes: they hang the wrong man and they don't finish the job. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern & Dennis Hopper co-star in this action-packed western.

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter
programme.desc: James Garner is back in the saddle again as hustler Latigo Smith whose latest con is passing off cowhand Jug (Jack Elam) as the dreaded gunman Swifty Morgan. But when the real Swifty shows up, the Wild West is going to get a whole lot wackier!

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff!
programme.desc: James Garner stars in this rollicking western spoof that has him taking on the job of a frontier town sheriff who must fend off villains (led by Walter Brennen) from every direction...all without breaking a sweat or dirtying his shiny black boots!

programme.title: Vera Cruz
programme.desc: In this epic Western, two shady mercenaries (Gary Cooper, Burt Lancaster) in Mexico during the 1866 revolution are hired to escort a Countess and her gold to the Mexican army in Vera Cruz and find themselves at odds with the army…and each other!

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: Stacy Keach, Haris Yulin, and Faye Dunaway give riveting performances in this controversial and myth-shattering reexamination of the darker side of gunslinger Doc Holliday and the actions that led to the infamous showdown in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: The Big Country
programme.desc: Burl Ives earned a Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his portrayal of a family patriarch involved in a bitter land feud in this explosive western drama that also features a sumptuous musical score.

programme.title: War and Peace
programme.desc: The personal stories of many characters, love affairs and philosophies are woven throughout this massive and intricate tapestry of Russia during Napoleon's invasion at the turn of the 19th century.

programme.title: Yours, Mine, and Ours
programme.desc: When widowed nurse Helen North (Lucille Ball) meets widower Frank Beardsley (Henry Fonda), a population explosion takes place as her eight kids blend (or don't) with his ten in this chaotic, classic comedy! Van Johnson and Tom Bosley co-star.

programme.title: Operation Petticoat
programme.desc: A submarine captain and his supply officer are determined to get their dry-dock sub back into WWII action. However, a bevy of nurses comes aboard, causing hijinks in the hot pink sub.

programme.title: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: Producer-director Otto Preminger’s epic treatment of the bombing of Pearl Harbor details the devastating attack on the Hawaiian naval base as well as the explosive, behind-the-scenes stories.

programme.title: The Bridges at Toko-Ri
programme.desc: This masterful story of a war-weary World War II veteran who must leave his family to fight again combines moving drama with surefire, bombs-away aerial action. Also starring Grace Kelly as his loving, luminescent wife.

programme.title: Stalag 17
programme.desc: Laced with comedy and cynicism, this is the story of a group of GIs who are thrown together in the notorious German prison camp Stalag 17, their suspicions about one being a spy and their efforts to escape.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: An Italian officer helps Hogan photograph a new German anti-aircraft gun.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: For Colonel Hogan's birthday his crew decides to give him one ammunition dump freshly destroyed.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Bumbling British Colonel Crittendon again disrupts Hogan's plans to get out an Allied officer who is also named Crittendon.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Germans have whipped up a plot to send German pilots in RAF fighters to shoot down British bombers.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Welcome to Demon School! Iruma-kun
programme.desc: The plan to destroy the school continues to move forward, and Iruma somehow makes it to the hidden room.

programme.title: Welcome to Demon School! Iruma-kun
programme.desc: The ordeal at Babyls comes to an end, and the Battler Party is finally about to start; the students all do their best in order to get the Grand Prize, and their families come by to enjoy the festivities.

programme.title: Welcome to Demon School! Iruma-kun

programme.title: Welcome to Demon School! Iruma-kun
programme.desc: One of the most popular idols in the netherworld is holding an all-day concert, and Iruma happens to get tickets.

programme.title: Warlords of Sigrdrifa

programme.title: How Heavy Are the Dumbbells You Lift?
programme.desc: After two other teachers join, Hibiki goes on a field trip with her group, but they all become lost.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un miembro adinerado de la sociedad muere después de caer de las escaleras, los testimonios de los testigos contradicen la evidencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Vestido para Matar
programme.desc: Se sospecha del padre de una niña cuando ella es asesinada, pero años después la policía se entera que un asesino condenado vivía cerca. Pequeñas gotas de sangre ayudan a la policía a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2002, el director de la funeraria, Lonnie Turner, fue encontrado muerto a tiros. Su hijo, Lonnie júnior, se convirtió en el principal sospechoso, particularmente después de que se descubriera que el asesinato se cometió con su arma.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de una mujer joven fue descubierto en una granja aislada cerca de Delano, California. Ella no tenía identificación, pero la policía encontró las llaves de un buzón de correo en los bolsillos de sus pantalones.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fiebre del oro
programme.desc: El despacho de emergencia recibió una llamada de un hombre que dijo que su novia se disparó y se suicidó. La autopsia reveló que la herida de bala no fue autoinfligida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pareja perfecta
programme.desc: Una examinación de la primera vez que se utilizó ADN animal para resolver un caso penal

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuatro caminos
programme.desc: Una mujer nativa americana fue brutalmente asesinada en el desierto de Nuevo México y la escena del crimen estaba llena de evidencia forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos hombres diferentes llamaron a la policía para denunciar el mismo asesinato. Al parecer, ninguno sabía que el otro había llamado. La investigación descubrió circunstancias aún más inusuales.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2005, David Castor sufrió una muerte lenta y agonizante durante varios días. Su esposa Stacey sostuvo que fue un suicidio, a pesar de que se hizo con un anticongelante.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2003, Kathy Lorick fue asesinada en una pista de carreras en Concord, California, en pleno día, mientras hablaba con su esposo por su teléfono móvil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de dispararle a sus víctimas en la cabeza, el asesino limpió la escena, colocó la evidencia incriminatoria en una bolsa de plástico y la arrojó al río.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Falso testimonio
programme.desc: La muerte de una mujer en Pensilvania desencadena una investigación por homicidio sobre la muerte de otra mujer en Carolina del Norte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1985, 121 personas en Dakota del Sur y Minnesota sufrieron una misteriosa enfermedad. Solo había habido un brote como ese, y cuando sucedió entonces, nadie pudo entender por qué.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía de California tenía varios sospechosos en el robo y brutal asesinato de una pareja de ancianos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando la policía encuentra el cuerpo de Krista Harrison, de 11 años, hay pocas pistas sobre la identidad del asesino. Pero las autoridades están intrigadas por las inusuales fibras naranjas incrustadas en la ropa que se encuentran cerca de la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que una pelea callejera le quitó la vida a un campeón nacional de lucha libre, la policía tuvo que determinar si fue asesinado a sangre fría o en defensa propia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Programado para el desastre
programme.desc: Una mujer de 29 años murió instantáneamente cuando una bomba explotó en su casa. El dispositivo era tan poderoso que la metralla estaba incrustada en las casas al otro lado de la calle.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Patrick McRae fue encontrado muerto en su casa de Des Moines y la escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre. El análisis mostró que procedían de dos personas, una de las cuales era mujer.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2003, el adolescente de St. Cloud, Jason MacLennan, regresó a su casa después de una noche con amigos y descubrió el cuerpo de su padre tirado en un charco de sangre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1997, se encontró el carro de Kelly Eckart, con todas sus pertenencias aún dentro del mismo, después de haber trabajado un turno nocturno en Franklin, Indiana. Días más tarde, se encontró su cuerpo en un barranco aislado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Dientes o Consecuencias
programme.desc: La investigación de un asesinato se ve obstaculizada por la falta de un cuerpo, pero la policía encuentra algunos restos carbonizados, incluyendo un diente cuyo relleno contiene propiedades que ayudan a los investigadores a identificar el cadáver.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2006, la agente de bienes raíces de Texas Sarah Anne Walker fue brutalmente asesinada en una casa modelo. Semanas después, se presentó un testigo que pudo haber visto al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Uno para llevar
programme.desc: Una pareja casada decidió escapar del frío del invierno con unas minivacaciones en Key West.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mujer había sido agredida sexualmente, apuñalada repetidamente y dada por muerta.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray fue acusada de la muerte de su esposo. Su hijo estaba tan convencido de su inocencia que se matriculó en la facultad de derecho, estudió todas las pruebas y, finalmente, descubrió la verdad de lo que realmente sucedió entre sus padres.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una bailarina de gogó le dijo a su familia que necesitaba alejarse por un tiempo, y luego simplemente desapareció. Los investigadores sospecharon, porque ella no se llevó ni su auto ni su ropa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Matan a un hombre joven en un misterioso accidente vehicular, pero la evidencia en la escena lleva a los investigadores a creer que no fue un accidente. La ciencia forense reveló lo que pasó realmente y la verdad es devastadora para tres familias.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 44 women begin the very first training camp at the new 1 billion dollar Cowboys' facility, The Star. At the First Meeting, Kelli lays down the law and makes it clear that eight women will be sent home this summer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: First, the ladies need to have the "classic look" of a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader. Kelli's hair and make-up transformations are legendary. The ladies are also assessed through a new state of the art fitness test, "Styku".

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli media trains the rookie candidates to determine who best represents the DCC at press events. NBC news anchor, Meredith Land tests their on-camera interview skills.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Personality is critical when representing the DCC brand. Kelli takes the women on location to see how they interact during a public appearance.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Katy Perry's choreographer, Nick Florez, stops by to offer some performance advice to the ladies. A day that each cheerleader never forgets. The first time they wear the DCC uniform to pose for their cameo photos.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The squad goes on an appearance to support pop music star, Demi Lovato. The ladies learn the entrance to the famed pre-game dance. It's a make or break moment. If a woman can't learn it quickly it might be her last night.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With two suspended vets, the team must re-block their formations for their Hall Of Fame performance. New vets step up as a new point of the triangle is named. The rookie candidates try to get their footing during this never seen before rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 23 veterans travel to Canton, Ohio to perform at Jerry Jones' induction to the Pro Football Hall of Fame. All eyes are watching as the DCC perform for the NFL elite.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As training camp winds down the pressure skyrockets. No one wants to be sent home now. The ladies start to crack under the pressure. Another one is sent home. Will this be the final cut?

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli announces the official squad and the women realize the hard-fought dream of becoming a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader. Full of excitement and nerves, the squad prepares for their very first football game at AT&T Stadium.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of eager hopefuls -- ranging from starry-eyed rookies to experienced NFL cheerleaders -- gather at AT&T Stadium for a shot at joining the world's most famous squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 125 remaining hopefuls must nail a choreographed routine before advancing to the final rounds, and the DCC veterans reveal their plans for the future.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A former Laker Girl who survived the Las Vegas shooting chases her dream, and the women work on their solo presentations and interviews as finals approach.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The returning veterans travel to the Bahamas to shoot the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders swimsuit calendar, and the rookies feel the pressure as training camp begins.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s intent on getting over Craig, and uses Liberty’s upcoming birthday as an excuse to throw a party at Emma’s house while Spike and Snake are out of town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In shock after over JT’s death, Toby turns to Liberty, convinced that his somber funeral isn’t what JT would’ve wanted. Liberty agrees, and the two grief-stricken friends plan to throw a celebratory memorial for JT at Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s parents want her to come home after the tragedy at Emma’s house – and to Emma’s surprise, Manny agrees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a spectacular panic attack during a midterm exam, Paige’s professor at Banting offers her one more chance – which comes in the form of a ton of work to be completed over the holiday weekend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With her degree in jeopardy thanks to her failing grades, and the little issue of a dramatic dorm fire, Paige develops a Banting allergy. She slinks home to Toronto with her tail between her legs – but nobody can know the truth about what happened.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige has one goal: to return to her former pre-Banting glory. She’s going to get back to doing what she does best. Everything – and that includes dating. Paige surprises Spinner by asking him out. Nothing serious, just casual.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s at loose ends with Dylan gone and nothing seems exciting. He and Spinner decide a spring break road trip will break the monotony – but cash is the key.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alex and her mother Emily are in trouble - Chad, Emily's boyfriend, has run up thousands of dollars in credit card debt and hasn't been paying the rent.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alex's double life is finally bringing in the cash she wants but hiding everything from everyone is taking a toll on her schoolwork and her connection with Paige.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The corridors of Degrassi have become a pressure cooker. With an unexpected influx of students from Lakehurst, Degrassi students find themselves facing old enemies and new friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Abstinence-pledged Darcy wakes up in a strange bed, screamingly hung-over. Panic-stricken, she tries to piece together the events of the night before. She knows – physically – she had sex, but everything else is a blank.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige is ecstatic to have landed herself a gig in the fashion world. If everything goes well, this could turn itself into a brand new career path.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After seeing Craig’s newly released album on the shelves at the record store, Ashley decides to pursue her own music – starting with a performance at the Lakehurst-Degrassi talent mixer.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Amidst the crowded classrooms and the battle for school territory, tensions between Lakehurst and Degrassi students continue to mount. But Spinner’s got his eye on enemy territory -- the adorably tough new Lakehurst girl, Jane.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Faced with his own aggression and looming mortality, Spinner attempts to prove his ‘masculinity’ by kicking an unnecessary amount of Lakehurst ass.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s moved back home but the honeymoon between she and her parents is just about over. And when her dad insists she have a traditional “Debut” – the lavish party many Filipino girls have for their 18th birthday – Manny takes a stand.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie’s ex-mentor Caitlin Ryan arrives to do a guest lecture series in Jesse’s class and Ellie sees her opportunity to set herself apart from her peers. She throws herself into Caitlin’s class assignment and her hard work quickly pays off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma decides she’ll do what it takes to get back on track, starting by rekindling her friendship with Manny, but when Manny wants to hit an audition to be a ‘Purple Dragon’ sports drink model, Emma finds herself quickly at odds with her best friend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner deals with chemo, timing how long he can go between barf-buckets, while his cheerleader Jane, tries to bring the party to him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco and Ellie’s retail therapy goes awry when Marco finds his credit card maxed out. Ellie rescues him this time, but Marco realizes a new job is the real solution—and might even give him the opportunity to meet new people.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Roofie rape victim Darcy is barreling down a self-destructive path and only a handful of people know why.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny and Jay’s faux-mance is working perfectly. But when Jay gets too serious, Manny reminds him it's all fake.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Manny discovers that her University demo reel is actually a sex tape that she and Jay made, her future hangs in the balance. By the time Jay catches up to her with the correct DVD, it's too late.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When cute and funny Rachel joins Peter, Danny & Derek’s MI group for their “How-To” video project, confidence is high.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia’s finally been granted a spot on Spirit Squad, and she’s ecstatic. But trying to be a normal teenager is proving a difficult balancing act.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige is on her A game - she's excelling at work, Andrea's given her a raise, and she’s going to use the money to redesign her bedroom.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Since Snake’s suspension from teaching, Emma’s life has been turned upside-down. He’s really in a funk, and the dark cloud over his head has fouled the air at home, where Emma finds herself caught in the no-man’s-land between her parents.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Living with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: David Attenborough learns that descendants of the dinosaur age are alive and well. David explores how they survived the catastrophes that wiped out other species.

programme.title: Iceman: Mummy From the Stone Age
programme.desc: The discovery of a 5,000-year-old male mummy in the Austrian Alps has enabled scientists to re-create a vanished world.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: It is only in recent years that experts have unearthed the biggest dinosaurs that ever lived. One monster eclipsed all others, more than seven times as heavy as diplodocus was the immense argentinosaurus.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur

programme.title: Life In The World's Largest Crater

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex amasses a bundle by playing the stock market on paper for his economics class, and courts disaster by secretly investing his father's money.

programme.title: Ong Bak
programme.desc: Raised by monks who taught him the Thai martial art of muay thai, Ting (Tony Jaa) is sent to Bangkok to retrieve the stolen head of the town's statue of the Buddha.

programme.title: Ong Bak 2: The Beginning
programme.desc: Tony Jaa stars in this epic tale of revenge set hundreds of years in the past. This prequel to Ong-Bak: The Thai Warrior takes Jaa's skills to the next level, showcasing him as a master of a wide range of martial arts styles.

programme.title: The Protector
programme.desc: Kham, a young fighter must go to Australia to retrieve his stolen elephant. He must take on a gang led by two deadly bodyguards and an evil woman.

programme.title: The Protector 2
programme.desc: When Boss Suchart is murdered, all evidence points to KHAM (Tony Jaa). Forced to run as he fights to clear his name, he is hunted by not only the police, but Boss Suchart’s revengeful twin nieces and LC (RZA), a crime lord with his own agenda.

programme.title: Skin Trade
programme.desc: Detective Nick Cassidy (Dolph Lundgren) goes to Bangkok after Viktor Dragovic (Ron Perlman), the human trafficker who killed his family. Agent Eddie Reed is sent to bring Nick home, and Thai detective Tony Vitayakui questions Nick's motives.

programme.title: Paradox
programme.desc: When his daughter goes missing, a police negotiator (Louis Koo) teams with local police (Tony Jaa) to find her, but instead finds himself embroiled in a web of corruption and violence in this explosive thriller from director Wilson Yip.

programme.title: Kill Zone 2

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the 1980s, a trio of unsolved murders occurred in Wichita Falls, Texas. Later, a fourth murder from the same time period provided the police with far more than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Prompted by news of a flight attendant's brutal murder, the son of a previous victim contacts police. Both murders have similar MOs, and biological evidence proves that these were serial killings.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Blood Moon
programme.desc: While protecting Ninjago City from daily threats, the Ninja encounters a new elemental master in league with an old enemy.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: Ras attacks the Cloud Kingdom to obtain information on the Forbidden Five; Euphrasia informs the ninja and they set off to save the kingdom.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Beyond the Phantasm Cave
programme.desc: Cinder and Jordana compete for Lord Ras's favour; the ninja set out to find a teacher who can defeat the Wolf Clan; Wyldfyre sneaks on the Destiny's Bounty.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Force From the East
programme.desc: The ninjas find two old dragon masters who agree to train them. Meanwhile, Ras invades the Land of Lost Things.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo sufren un accidente en el desayuno que les trae muchos problemas. Mientras Jonathan necesita el apoyo de su familia para una presentación en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián. Segunda parte.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una persona del pasado del Abuelo reaparece en su vida. El Noruego tiene problemas dentales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are in a remote area pursing a mysterious treasure, when they save a woman being chased by hoodlums. The woman invites the two back to her sister's manor, which is full of beautiful women…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A mysterious woman who claims to be Fujiko's aunt, gives Lupin an ultimatum: Find Marshal Rommel's lost gold or die! First, Lupin must decipher the location of the gold, written in ancient hieroglyphs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The great thief Nezumi-Kozou Jirokichi IV appears before Goemon and reveals that their ancestors competed in the first International Thieves Championship together, but were defeated by Lupin's grandfather, Arsène Lupin…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The warden of an African prison is holding Fujiko captive. Lupin and his gang infiltrate the prison and attempt to break Fujiko out, but they become the target of the Iron Lizards, robotic devices developed to chase down fugitives!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Linda, a beautiful dancer, has stolen Jigen's heart and a vengeful Meyer has taken Fujiko hostage. Believing the women they love are in danger and unaware that Linda and Meyer are working together, Lupin and Jigen are set up to kill each other…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: According to legend, a stamp named the Cinderella Shadow is said to make its owner a princess. Lupin and his gang pull off the heist, but a girl name Alice who also wants the stamp tags along. Will the little girl get her royal wish?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has sent a notice declaring he will steal all the cash from every bank in Paris. Detective Melon, the granddaughter of Inspector Garimard, is chosen to catch Lupin alongside Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has many secret techniques up his sleeve, and one of them is his Levitation Technique. In order to get their hands on this technique, a crime syndicate plots a dirty trick, where a fake Lupin tortures a man known as X8 and frames the real Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Inspector Zenigata get kidnapped and the two are forcibly conscripted into the Foreign Legion in Morocco. Lupin and Inspector Zenigata make a run for it, but not before they're shackled together at the neck.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Beautiful Swedish twins, Latica and Anita, are engaged in a battle to the death over the Viking treasure map concealed on their backs. In disguise, Lupin learns the map's secret, but the map possesses an additional secret.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A hit has been ordered on Lupin and Puma, a formidable hitman who specializes in long-range attacks, is on his trail! Lupin takes his chances with a close range, one-on-one showdown against Puma, but the plan seemingly backfires and Lupin is shot…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Orion's Crown has been stolen and is up for grabs at a black-market auction. Lupin has his eyes on both the crown and the auction money, but first he must outsmart the other parties vying for the crown, including Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A two-thousand-year-old casket has been excavated. Inside the casket is Camilla, a beautiful woman in a near-death state, holding a golden statuette of the Virgin Mary. Lupin attempts to steal the golden statuette, but things don't go as planned…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are attending a party in Africa, waiting for an opportunity to snatch a rare black pearl. However, their plan goes awry when a gang of gorillas crashes the party and steals the black pearl.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Massive riches have been hidden inside Tsukikage Castle. Lupin and his gang must decipher a code to find out the whereabouts of this great treasure. Wii Lupin be able to locate the treasure before his rivals do?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen head to Mongolia in search of Genghis Khan's treasures. Meanwhile, Goemon is visiting his ancestor's grave to pay his respects when he encounters Fujiko, who is in search of Yoshitsune Minamoto's buried treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The ICPO chief promises to erase Fujiko's criminal record in exchange for her cooperation in arresting Lupin. Up against an ego-bruised Inspector Zenigata and a determined Fujiko, have Lupin's heisting days come to an end?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen sneak on board a ship smuggling diamonds. However, what they find on board are several thousand chickens! Lupin and his gang infiltrate the Hong Kong smuggling boss's lair where diamonds are being illicitly sold…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal a suitcase containing Costa Rican diamonds, but the contents turns out to be Inspector Zenigata. The real diamonds are being shipped to Puerto Rico inside a missile and Lupin must find out the precise launch time to intercept it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Kaguya, a beautiful woman, separately asks Lupin, Jigen and Goemon to gather the tears of the Yeti, a mermaid's scale, and the liver of a dragon so she can make a secret potion.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A wealthy shipping magnate and also a bachelor, Onabes' final voyage is nothing short of extravagant, with a ship full of beautiful women and fine art. Things go as planned when Lupin infiltrates the ship disguised as a woman…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is in Hong Kong for a vacation when he is asked to find a woman in return for helping him escape from Inspector Zenigata. Lupin discovers the pickpocket who stole his wallet is the daughter of the woman he is looking for…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Sleeping Lion, a statue made of solid gold, is being transported to a museum by a specially armored, airtight car. Lupin steals the armored car together with the statue and nearly asphyxiated Inspector Zenigata inside.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin manages to steal crime boss Mulligan's precious jewels, only have them stolen from him by Fujiko! Mulligan, unaware that Fujiko has his jewels, hires a skilled gunman named Hangman to take them back from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has been put on auction at the Wanted Club and Dr. Mad places the winning bid. Dr. Mad also purchases Fujiko and Jigen from the auctions. The three are abandoned on a deserted island with killer cyborgs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has his eyes on the royal family's Imperial State Crown, but thanks to Scotland Yard's Inspector Dover, stealing it won't be easy.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin announces he's going to steal the betting takes at the Kentucky Derby, but the heist fails. However, it's all part of the plan. Lupin's main target is really the Metropolitan Bank's underground vault.

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Germaine Vaughan shows Mister Rogers how to break dance. Chrissie Thompson, who is handicapped, visits. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Ana Platypus wants to be in the wedding but can't. Daniel is having trouble being the ring bearer.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a pottery studio to see how Eva Kwong makes a bowl. Later, Mister Rogers talks about weddings. Betty Okonak Templeton Jones marries James Michael Jones in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: While planting a seed, Mister Rogers talks about how long it takes for plants to grow and that learning to wait is important. He also shows a video about how people make orange juice.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film of a bird family, and an origami artist demonstrates how to make paper birds and puppets. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, a puppet couple, Betty and James, adopt a baby daughter.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits pediatrician Dr. Jane Breck, who shows young viewers what might happen during a child's routine checkup. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Cousin Mary Owl plans a cousin reunion!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about how children are curious about families that are formed by adoption and talks about his family's adoption of his own sister. He shows a film about different families in his Neighborhood.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Sea World to see the families of penguins there. He talks about how every person in the world is different from everybody else. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, the cousin reunion takes place.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers builds several things on the sand table and talks about different ways to play. He shows a video of some of the many ways children like to play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At Chef Brockett's bakery, Eva Kwong's grandmother makes special Chinese dumplings, and Mister Rogers talks about how children can learn about so many things from adults.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how people make wooden rocking horses. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Mr. Aber gets a mask that makes him look like King Friday, and the Neighbors talk about the importance of making and keeping friends.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows viewers a kitten named Jimmy and a film of Jimmy's birth, and assures viewers that "it's all right to wonder about things." Then, poet and essayist May Sarton visits.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers invites viewers along on a visit to a special new playground designed and built by both adults and children. He makes up a song at the piano.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how empty containers plus some imagination can create a whole Neighborhood. In Make-Believe, Ana Platypus is jealous of Prince Tuesday's new bike and angry because her parents aren't buying one for her.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Kin

programme.title: Occupation
programme.desc: Some town residents have to band together after a devastating alien invasion. As they struggle to survive, they realize they must stay one step ahead of their attackers and work together for a chance to strike back.

programme.title: El show de Maury
